title: Ankylosaurus in Prehistoric Forest Coloring Page
seoTitle: Ankylosaurus in Prehistoric Forest Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a detailed Ankylosaurus walking through a cycad forest. Moderate armor plating details. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Ankylosaurus featured a massive bony club at the end of its tail, which it likely used as a defense weapon against predators.
The back of Ankylosaurus was covered in osteoderms—bony plates fused directly into its skin, acting like a natural shield of armor.
